query: SELECT id, imageUrl LIKE '%cloudfront%' as has_new_img FROM articles WHERE id >= 60000;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 42vUY4GWD37yPbX.84737946735b --database 3BmmrMXwxV4Z2AuoDAe93z --execute SELECT id, imageUrl LIKE '%cloudfront%' as has_new_img FROM articles WHERE id >= 60000;
